appName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and extension manager

appDesc.message: One-click auto-save for 115 Cloud share pages: enter access code, save, confirm folder.

welcomeSubtitle.message: Three clicks become one on every 115 share page.

welcomeIntro.message: Open any 115 share link and the extension will submit the access code, trigger the save and confirm the target folder for you.

step1Desc.message: Clicks the OK button to submit the access code right after the page loads.

step2Desc.message: Clicks the Save button to open the save dialog.

step3Desc.message: Clicks the "Save here" button to finish the transfer.

settingsEnabledDesc.message: When disabled, the extension will not click any buttons automatically.

settingsActionDelayDesc.message: Minimum delay between steps; raise it for slow networks.

settingsAutoSelectRecentDesc.message: Pre-select the most recent folder when the save dialog opens.

settingsAutoCloseSuccessDesc.message: Click the close button automatically once the save success toast appears.
